review_title: Great management system and user friendly!
description: This platform helped me perform my duties with effectiveness and with precise information.
author: Yendi C.
pros: This platform helps ease the workload in the HR role, very user friendly, no hassle in understanding how the platform works. Very efficient when generating reports. I had a situation with the platform once, so I had to contact customer service. They were very helpful and respectful, they definitely solved my problem. Overall, this platform, you can customized it and permits the employee to do their yearly appraisal.
cons: Few times the notification haven't gone thru, so there has been a delay in the workload. This happened when there was an update available. So I guess that we needed to set the settings again back to how they were, but no big issue, it was resolved.

review_title: Performing performance reviews for mid-year and yearly evaluations
author: Catherine M.
pros: I liked being able to create benchmarks, goals, initiatives for staff members and then being able to readily use those to rate the performance of that staff member. Keeping the reviews electronically from year to year eliminates the "lost" hard copy paperwork and accountability.
cons: I think what seemed most troubling was being able to go back and make changes once items had been submitted. I sometimes found that process a little more difficult than maybe it should have been.

review_title: Not as robust as other solutions; however, reporting is great.
description: I'm happy with our rate of compliance since we have implemented this solution.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The reporting tools. We did not have that in our previous solution and this has been fantastic with helping us reach our goals for compliance within our organization.
cons: Sometimes the user interface has issues and can be slow. It isn't necessarily as intuitive as I'd like it to be. Users sometimes complain about certain issues they didn't experience with our previous solution.

description: Using Performance Pro truly promotes what every HR head would be looking for in streamlining the Performance Management and Performance Review process. Getting your organization to understand the importance of effective Performance Management is difficult enough, being able to offer and utilize a solution that gives everyone a web based tools to guide the process rather than restrict and dictate the process has been a nothing but a win-win for the employees and in meeting business results.
author: Jennifer D.
pros: Performance Pro offers a web based solution and is incredibly user-friendly on both the administrator and end-user side. Everything to make the review or coaching process experience easy and efficient is offered right within the system. If customization is needed, you can actually do most if not all of it on your own and there is no additional charge.There are a number of factors to select from, goals can be customized for specific positions and reviewed and evaluated periodically with employees throughout the year. If you really break it down, your administrative expenses will be reduced and you should see an immediate return in that your goals and factors align directly with business objectives.
cons: More of a wish list, I would love if the system integrated with our HRIS system, the good news, from what I heard it will be able to very shortly!!! :)

description: Performance Pro is indeed a useful software especially for the HR department. Also the customer service is very efficient and prompt.
author: Jane I.
pros: With Performance Pro, it's 'goodbye' to usage of paper, and 'hello' to advanced technology, and the 'icing on the cake' is it's timely evaluations. It’s user-friendly and so simple to understand even by our junior staff.
cons: It's cumbersome to ascertain performance pay increase by tracking completed evaluations due to the fact that it has to be done manually, instead of being notified when the evaluation process has been completed.

author: Alexandria S.
pros: This software prints your review information very concisely and neat for in person reviewing.
cons: Not easy to use at all. I have used this software many times for performance reviews, and I constantly have to remind myself how to use it. There is a lack of logic on this site when it comes to adding goals.

review_title: A great tool to administrate HR systems and processes.
description: If you want a robust HR system I highly recommend it.
author: Luis Carlos R.
pros: - It gives multiple tools at low cost. - Support is quick, atent and solve every doub. - It has 360 appraisal option. - It's easy to use as a worker and as a manager.
cons: - It's very slow to load. - Interface looks old and you have to make a lot of clicks to get the things done.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Excellent to document and evaluate. The customer service is efficient and friendly.
author: noelis Q.
pros: It has the property to establish objectives and track them quarterly. Employees can do a self-assessment that is then combined with the evaluation of the supervisors.
cons: It can be a bit confusing to use at first, but with training and support, it becomes easy to use quickly, it can be a bit slow to load
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Not the easiest software to use..
description: It allowed me to make customizable reminders and emails to management.
author: Paul M.
pros: It is definitely helpful for setting goals and tracking them. Every quarter, you can update and track. I also like the ability for documentation.
cons: It is very complex, and it does not make you save which is weird in itself. The navigation is not self-explanatory.

author: Alejandro P.
pros: It is a powerful software, easy to use that allows you to evaluate the performance of the professionals based on the company's goal, offering simple and effective practices to the employees from an automated system, it also provides activity dashboards, customizable templates according to the requirements of the company and automated email reminders
cons: It is a little bit slow to load, but I think is still a good alternative, If theres is an issue, you just have to contact customer service and they will assist you

review_title: Performance Management Made Easy With Performance Pro
author: Paola O.
pros: With Performance Pro, implementing HR processes for effective performance management has been easy. Has plenty of features and allows personalization.
cons: With Performance Pro, there hasn't been serious flaws.

description: Overall, if you are doing performance evaluations, I haven’t used a solution that was any easier Performance Pro. I can’t recommend it enough.
author: Michael L.
pros: Doing employee evaluations is never fun, whether you are using software, or plugging the info into a word doc. That being said, every so often software comes around that makes it a little easier. Performance Pro manages to do the impossible - it makes capturing info throughout the review period simple, tracking goals a breeze, and presenting the actual evaluation a snap. Plus it spell checks everything so you don’t have to play the “write in word and then copy and paste into the program you are using game.”
cons: Sometimes, the interface can be a little clunky - finding certain features, if you don’t use them every day, can be a little challenging. But, in all fairness, this is a relatively minor quibble.

description: Excellent customer service. Always helpful and eager to assist. Everyone is knowledgeable about the product and always kind. There are never any dumb questions.
author: Belinda W.
pros: Overall use of this software is good. Easy to navigate.
cons: . I have been on a conference call regarding the performance application and would love to be able to set up more than 1 appraisal at time for an employee. When we have an employee promote the current manager has to complete the review then update all information and set up a second review for the promoted position. I then have to average the totals for a final score. This is very time consuming.

description: Performance Pro is simple to use and it a great tool for all staff - management to frontline staff. We encourage all staff to use the program for goal setting and tracking as well as performance tracking. The ease of keeping notes and tracking performance is one of the best features. The notification system is a great tool when it comes to being reminded of performance evaluations that need to be completed.
author: Donna D.
pros: All staff can use it with ease. Goals are easy to set up and track. Editing notes is simple and we really like the function to be able to share notes with others.
cons: None at this time.

review_title: Performance Pro makes annual reviews fun and simple
description: This is an adaptable product to all levels of employee engagement and levels of management from clerical and teller to senior management and even the CEO. It provides a consistent palette on which to measure and manage performance expectations and results. When this product is combined with a great administration it eliminates the often acrimonious discussions about fairness and who gets what. It can be a bit confusing to use at first, but with training and support, it quickly becomes easy to use.
author: Tony B.
pros: This product makes entering review consistent and easy. It is enjoyable talking to employees about actual goals since entering and reporting on their accomplishment those goals is so easy. The clarity that this product provides for the individual being evaluated to better understand how they actually did and the inclusion of factors that fairly present the personal qualities needed in various senior management. This is a great product to use for any size company that is looking for a performance review software. Great customer service!

author: Carole R.
pros: Weekly Email notifications when review due until review completed. Note section for Supervisors and Mangers to add notes for great jobs and coaching's. Easy to set-up and assign factors and goals.
cons: When employee changes job title goals do not change. Would like the downline to have more levels, currently set at 4.

description: I am satisfied. I am able to pull up past evals that were processed through Performance Pro and save these docs as PDF or view on the site.
author: Virginia R.
pros: As you learn how to navigate you can jump between employees to review appraisals or move to employee dashboard and view your own appraisal.
cons: The navigation is sometimes confusing when looking for a previous appraisal or trying to get back to the appraisal you were working on.

description: I have only used the product for about a year but find it very easy to use and fit the needs of our small credit union. The customer service has been top notch since the very beginning. There has never been a time that my question or issue has not been resolved.
author: Heather K.
pros: Everything is very stream lined and easy to navigate. I also like that we can customize the product to fit with our credit union culture and lingo.
cons: I would like to be able to see a history on the employee data screen. So if someone changed positions in between an appraisal cycle we could see the change and track it better.

author: Kadilynn H.
pros: It was easy to use and very fun I guess.
cons: I liked everything about it there wasn't anything bad

description: Overall very good program. Has a few enhancements needed to make it even better. Its a good solution for daily staff performance systems.
author: Karen R.
pros: Accessibility and manageability. Great features. Good upgrades.
cons: Small format when printing performance documents is horrible. Building forms is limited and still chunky. Would be nice to be able to attach documents (links) to actual performance forms instead of having to go to different area and find it. Routing process is still difficult. Having multiple appraisers is also difficult.

author: Donna H.
pros: No more paper for our organization!!! I love the electronic use of the system and ease of updates.
cons: As with all system, there are things that I feel could improve, but for the most part it is a fantastic system! I would advise potential clients to stress the need for knowing exactly what your competencies should be and get them right the first time. This is very important to the most efficient set up of the system.

review_title: Ease of Use of Performance Pro
author: Jennifer M.
pros: Performance Pro has been a great product for our organziation. Specificially, it meets the needs of our performance review process by being easy to use and flexible to change. It was important that the software that we chose could handle our 9 point rating scale, job specific competencies and work plan goals; Performance Pro delivered on all of these features.
cons: I like it all. All of my interactions with Performance Pro including training, customer support and implementation have been good.

review_title: Everything about Performance Pro has been 5 star, especially their customer support.
author: Becky S.
pros: Evaluations are prompted to be timely, employee feedback is great. There is a library with many comments and ideas to use. Our management team loves the ease of evaluations and now they are more informative than previously.

review_title: Phenomenal - brought clarity, consistency and transparency to our performance management efforts.
author: Peggy D.
pros: Allows for performance management to truly be a collaborative process between employee and manager. Also, provides for a meaningful way to track goals and job competencies for a full performance picture. Allows employees to see their profile and related uploaded documents at any time. Lastly, the ability to create 'Forms' for internal use is awesome - sends, collects signatures, and stores for historical reference.
cons: Would love to eventually see Compease and Performance Pro fully merged so just one sign-on. Right now each have a separate application - if combined, or at least the ability to move from one to another embedded in the application, that would be wonderful!

author: Joanna G.
pros: This program is easy to use, very user-friendly.
cons: N/A. There is nothing I really did not like about this software.
